# Template — PLAN_SUMMARY.md (auto-generated one-pager)

<!-- token-budget: <=2K output -->
<!-- requires: [pm]  (engineer strongly preferred) -->
<!-- loads: [meta, brief, goals, product, architecture, decisions] -->
<!-- eager: yes — always rendered on the initial run -->

The human one-pager. **The founder/PM opens this; engineers open the JSON.** Slot-fill from the loaded files only. Omit any section whose source file is absent (e.g. no `architecture` on a PM-only edge case → shorten the approach line, don't stub).

---

## Render shape

```markdown
# <brief.vision title> — Plan Summary

**What we're building.** <brief.vision>

**Who it's for.** <brief.target_users, one line each>

## MVP feature list
<for f in product.mvp.included: - **<f.name>** — <one line, cite serves goal>>
_Deferred to roadmap:_ <product.mvp.deferred names>

## Timeline & approach
<architecture.approach, 2–3 sentences> · Timeline: <brief.timeline.horizon>
Roadmap: <product.roadmap phases, one line each>

## Top 3 risks
<aggregate the highest-severity across product_risks / engineering_risks / security_risks / ux_risks / release_risks>
1. **<risk>** — <mitigation>
2. ...
3. ...

## Open decisions requiring your input
<for es in decisions.escalations: - <question> — options: <options>>
<if none: "None — all conflicts resolved by Consensus (see decisions.json).">

---
_Confidence: <brief.confidence> · Roster: <roster.included roles> · Generated by IdeaFoundry_
```

## Rules
- **Aggregate** risks across specialists; don't just copy one file's risks.
- Escalations come straight from `decisions.escalations` — this is the section the user acts on.
- Stay ≤2K. If MVP has many features, list names only and point to `12-developer-tickets.md`.
